guidelines_title: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology: Kidney Cancer

changes: Initial kidney taxonomy built from NCCN Kidney Cancer v1.2026 (92 pages). Covers KID-1 through KID-E.
17 disease categories across histology × stage × IMDC risk × treatment-line axes.
9 clinical axes: histology, imdc_risk, prior_systemic_lines, prior_io, prior_vegf_tki, nephrectomy_status, vhl_status, met_alteration, sarcomatoid.
Belzutifan (VHL/HIF-2α) axis captured under vhl_status and hereditary_rcc category.
nccRCC subtypes split into 4 histology-specific categories plus general catchall — reflecting trial enrollment patterns (SWOG 1500 for papillary; chromophobe treated differently).
Adjuvant post-nephrectomy split from localized surgery categories — matches KEYNOTE-564 trial enrollment criteria.

classification_philosophy: Inclusive — when ambiguous, include in adjacent categories. Better to over-tag than miss a trial. Multi-label: one trial may appear under localized, adjuvant, and/or metastatic settings if eligibility spans states. nccRCC trials should be tagged under both the specific subtype (papillary, chromophobe) AND metastatic_ncrcc_general unless explicitly restricted.

categories.label: Localized — Stage I (T1a, ≤4 cm)
categories.description: Clinical stage I T1a (≤4 cm) renal cell carcinoma — partial nephrectomy preferred; ablation, active surveillance, and SBRT as alternatives for medically inoperable patients

categories.label: Localized — Stage I (T1b, 4–7 cm)
categories.description: Clinical stage I T1b (4–7 cm) renal cell carcinoma — partial or radical nephrectomy; ablation for select patients not fit for surgery

categories.label: Localized — Stage II / III
categories.description: Localized stage II–III RCC — radical nephrectomy ± partial nephrectomy; includes vena cava extension if resectable. Adjuvant pembrolizumab discussed separately.

categories.label: Adjuvant — Post-Nephrectomy, High-Risk ccRCC
categories.description: Adjuvant therapy after complete nephrectomy for high-risk/high-grade clear cell RCC — pembrolizumab is the standard (KEYNOTE-564). Does NOT apply to non-clear cell histology.

categories.label: Locally Advanced — Unresectable
categories.description: Locally advanced RCC not amenable to upfront surgery — systemic or neoadjuvant therapy trials; overlaps with stage IV if distant mets develop

categories.label: Metastatic ccRCC — IMDC Favorable Risk, 1st Line
categories.description: Metastatic or advanced clear cell RCC, IMDC favorable risk (0 factors), treatment-naïve — axitinib/pembrolizumab, cabozantinib/nivolumab, lenvatinib/pembrolizumab (all Cat 1 preferred); sunitinib, pazopanib, IO/IO as alternatives

categories.label: Metastatic ccRCC — IMDC Intermediate/Poor Risk, 1st Line
categories.description: Metastatic or advanced clear cell RCC, IMDC intermediate or poor risk (1–6 factors), treatment-naïve — IO/IO (ipilimumab/nivolumab) or IO/TKI doublets preferred

categories.label: Metastatic ccRCC — 1st Line, All Risk Groups
categories.description: Metastatic clear cell RCC, first-line, all IMDC risk groups — trials that do not restrict by IMDC score. Preferred IO/TKI doublets apply across all risk groups.

categories.label: Metastatic ccRCC — 2nd Line+, Post-IO
categories.description: Metastatic clear cell RCC after prior IO-containing regimen — cabozantinib, lenvatinib/everolimus, belzutifan, tivozanib, nivolumab/cabozantinib; clinical trial preferred

categories.label: Metastatic ccRCC — 2nd Line+, IO-Naïve (Prior TKI)
categories.description: Metastatic clear cell RCC, second line or later, IO-naïve — patients who received a VEGF-TKI as first-line without checkpoint inhibitor. Nivolumab, cabozantinib, lenvatinib/everolimus are category 2A preferred.

categories.label: Metastatic ccRCC — 3rd Line and Beyond
categories.description: Metastatic clear cell RCC, third line and beyond — tivozanib (≥2 prior including IO), belzutifan, clinical trial strongly preferred

categories.label: Metastatic ccRCC — General (Any Line / Unspecified Risk)
categories.description: Metastatic clear cell RCC — general/unspecified treatment line or IMDC risk. Use when trial does not restrict by risk or prior-line. Multi-label with specific 1L/2L categories.

categories.label: Metastatic nccRCC — Papillary (Type 1/2, HLRCC)
categories.description: Metastatic papillary RCC (type 1 MET-driven, type 2, or HLRCC-associated) — cabozantinib preferred (SWOG 1500); bevacizumab/erlotinib for HLRCC; MET-targeted for type 1. Clinical trial enrollment strongly encouraged.

categories.label: Metastatic nccRCC — Chromophobe
categories.description: Metastatic chromophobe RCC — sunitinib, cabozantinib (activity more limited); IO combinations have modest activity. Clinical trial preferred. Associated with Birt-Hogg-Dubé syndrome.

categories.label: Metastatic nccRCC — Collecting Duct / Medullary
categories.description: Metastatic collecting duct carcinoma or renal medullary carcinoma (SMARCB1/INI1-deficient) — aggressive; chemotherapy-based regimens and clinical trials. Renal medullary carcinoma often associated with sickle cell trait.

categories.label: Metastatic nccRCC — Translocation (TFE3/TFEB, Xp11)
categories.description: Metastatic translocation RCC (Xp11.2/TFE3 or t(6;11)/TFEB) — rare; mTOR inhibitors have some activity; clinical trial enrollment strongly preferred

categories.label: Metastatic nccRCC — General / Unclassified
categories.description: Metastatic non-clear cell RCC, unspecified or unclassified subtype — trials enrolling broad nccRCC populations. Multi-label with specific subtype categories when applicable.

categories.label: Hereditary RCC Syndromes (VHL, HLRCC, Hereditary Papillary)
categories.description: Hereditary kidney cancer syndromes — VHL disease (belzutifan), HLRCC (FH-deficient), hereditary papillary RCC (MET), Birt-Hogg-Dubé (FLCN), SDH-deficient RCC. Genetic counseling and nephron-sparing surgery principles apply.

histology.description: Tumor histology on pathology — the single most important axis for kidney cancer trial eligibility. Clear cell vs non-clear cell determines which regimens apply. Non-clear cell subtypes each have distinct biology and trial populations.
histology._ui_note: If histology=unknown: surface both ccRCC and nccRCC trials with flag 'Confirm histology from pathology report — clear cell vs non-clear cell subtype determines which trials the patient qualifies for. This is the most critical eligibility axis for kidney cancer trials.'

imdc_risk.description: IMDC (International Metastatic RCC Database Consortium) risk score for metastatic RCC. 6 factors: Karnofsky PS <80%, diagnosis-to-treatment <1 year, anemia, hypercalcemia, neutrophilia, thrombocytosis. 0 factors = favorable; 1–2 = intermediate; 3–6 = poor.
imdc_risk._ui_note: If imdc_risk=unknown and trial restricts to a specific risk group: surface trial with flag 'IMDC risk score not confirmed — calculate using KPS, time to treatment, hemoglobin, calcium, neutrophils, and platelets. 0 factors = favorable; 1–2 = intermediate; 3+ = poor.'

prior_systemic_lines.description: Number of prior systemic therapy regimens for metastatic/advanced RCC
prior_systemic_lines._ui_note: If prior_systemic_lines=unknown and trial targets a specific line: surface trial with flag 'Confirm number of prior systemic regimens — trial eligibility depends on treatment line (1st-line naive vs. 2nd-line vs. 3rd-line+).'

prior_io.description: Prior immune checkpoint inhibitor therapy (anti-PD-1, anti-PD-L1, or anti-CTLA-4) for RCC. NOTE: detection_rules are ordered no→yes so that 'no prior systemic treatment' context is caught before drug-name patterns that could span the text blob.
prior_io._ui_note: If prior_io=unknown and trial stratifies by IO status: surface trial with flag 'Confirm prior IO therapy — has the patient received any PD-1, PD-L1, or CTLA-4 inhibitor? This determines second-line regimen eligibility (belzutifan, tivozanib, and others differ by IO history).'

prior_vegf_tki.description: Prior VEGF-targeted therapy (TKI or anti-VEGF antibody) for RCC. detection_rules ordered no→yes to avoid false positives when study drug appears in text alongside negated 'prior' context.
prior_vegf_tki._ui_note: If prior_vegf_tki=unknown and trial requires or excludes prior anti-VEGF therapy: surface trial with flag 'Confirm prior VEGF/TKI therapy — has the patient received sunitinib, pazopanib, axitinib, cabozantinib, sorafenib, or bevacizumab?'

nephrectomy_status.description: Whether the patient has undergone nephrectomy and current candidacy for cytoreductive nephrectomy
nephrectomy_status._ui_note: If nephrectomy_status=unknown and trial requires or restricts by nephrectomy: surface trial with flag 'Confirm nephrectomy status — has the patient had the primary kidney tumor removed? Some adjuvant trials require prior nephrectomy; some metastatic trials stratify by cytoreductive nephrectomy candidacy.'

vhl_status.description: VHL gene status — relevant for belzutifan (HIF-2α inhibitor) eligibility and hereditary syndrome management
vhl_status._ui_note: If vhl_status=unknown and trial targets VHL/HIF-2α: surface trial with flag 'VHL mutation or disease status not confirmed — belzutifan trials may require confirmed VHL disease (germline) or somatic VHL mutation. Molecular testing recommended.'

met_alteration.description: MET gene alteration (amplification, mutation, exon skipping) — primary biomarker axis for papillary type 1 RCC; MET-targeted TKIs (savolitinib, crizotinib, cabozantinib) may be particularly active
met_alteration._ui_note: If met_alteration=unknown and trial targets MET (especially for papillary RCC): surface trial with flag 'MET alteration status not confirmed — MET-directed trials (savolitinib, crizotinib, cabozantinib) may have enriched activity in MET-amplified or MET-mutant papillary type 1 RCC. Molecular testing recommended.'

sarcomatoid.description: Presence of sarcomatoid or rhabdoid differentiation — aggressive histologic feature; may predict improved response to IO-based regimens (particularly IO/IO combinations). Relevant across all histologic subtypes.
sarcomatoid._ui_note: If sarcomatoid=unknown and trial restricts to sarcomatoid-enriched population: surface trial with flag 'Confirm presence or absence of sarcomatoid differentiation — pathology review recommended. IO-based regimens (nivolumab/cabozantinib, nivolumab/ipilimumab) show enhanced activity in sarcomatoid RCC.'

localized_t1a: Active surveillance (small mass <3 cm, competing comorbidities)
Thermal ablation — cryotherapy or RFA (medically inoperable)
localized_t1b: Ablative techniques (select patients not surgical candidates)
adjuvant_post_nephrectomy: Pembrolizumab x 1 year (Stage II grade 4/sarcomatoid, Stage III ccRCC, or M1 NED)
locally_advanced_unresectable: Systemic therapy as for metastatic disease
metastatic_ccrcc_favorable_1l: Ipilimumab + nivolumab (Cat 2A — FDA approval int/poor only)
metastatic_ccrcc_3l_plus: Belzutifan (Cat 2A if prior IO; Cat 2B if IO-naive)
hereditary_rcc: Nephron-sparing surgery (preferred for all hereditary syndromes)
Active surveillance for small lesions (<3 cm)

known_trial_anchors.description: Named landmark trials for cross-reference and classification validation

trials.name: KEYNOTE-426
trials.intervention: Axitinib + pembrolizumab vs sunitinib, 1L ccRCC all risk

trials.name: CheckMate 9ER
trials.intervention: Cabozantinib + nivolumab vs sunitinib, 1L ccRCC all risk

trials.name: CLEAR
trials.intervention: Lenvatinib + pembrolizumab vs sunitinib, 1L ccRCC all risk

trials.name: CheckMate 214
trials.intervention: Ipilimumab + nivolumab vs sunitinib, 1L ccRCC int/poor risk

trials.name: CABOSUN
trials.intervention: Cabozantinib vs sunitinib, 1L ccRCC int/poor risk (phase II)

trials.name: METEOR
trials.intervention: Cabozantinib vs everolimus, 2L ccRCC after VEGF-TKI

trials.name: CheckMate 025
trials.intervention: Nivolumab vs everolimus, 2L ccRCC after anti-angiogenic

trials.name: RECORD-1
trials.intervention: Everolimus vs placebo, 2L ccRCC after TKI

trials.name: Litespark-005
trials.intervention: Belzutifan vs everolimus, 2L ccRCC after IO and VEGF-TKI

trials.name: TIVO-3
trials.intervention: Tivozanib vs sorafenib, 3L ccRCC (≥2 prior regimens)

trials.name: SWOG 1500
trials.intervention: Cabozantinib vs sunitinib vs crizotinib vs savolitinib, papillary RCC

trials.name: CARMENA
trials.intervention: Cytoreductive nephrectomy + sunitinib vs sunitinib alone, 1L ccRCC

trials.name: JAVELIN Renal 101
trials.intervention: Axitinib + avelumab vs sunitinib, 1L ccRCC all risk

imdc_risk_model.description: International Metastatic RCC Database Consortium (IMDC) prognostic model — 6 independent adverse factors
factors: Time from diagnosis to systemic therapy < 1 year
Corrected calcium > upper limit of normal
Absolute neutrophil count > upper limit of normal
Platelet count > upper limit of normal
